====Pokémon====
This listing is of Nessa's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in [[Pokémon: Twilight Wings]]:
=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Nessa
|pkmn=Drednaw
|type1=Water
|type2=Rock
|img=Nessa Drednaw TW.png
|epnum=TW04
|epname=Early-Evening Waves
|desc={{p|Drednaw}} was seen being defeated by [[Milo]]'s [[Dynamax]] {{p|Eldegoss}} during Nessa's Champion Cup battle against him.

Drednaw's only known move is {{m|Crunch}}{{tt|*|Mentioned only}}.}}

=====Befriended=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Nessa
|pkmn=Milotic
|stage1=Feebas
|type1=Water
|img=Nessa Feebas TW.png
|cap=Feebas
|img2=Nessa and Milotic TW.png
|cap2=Milotic
|epnum=TW04
|epname=Early-Evening Waves
|desc=As a child, Nessa encountered a {{p|Feebas}}, and encouraged it to grow bigger. She also requested if she could ride on it once it [[Evolution|evolved]]. Years later, Feebas returned as a {{p|Milotic}}, who fulfilled the request from earlier and let Nessa ride on it. This encounter prompted her to move forward with her goal to be both a [[Gym Leader]] and a model at the same time.

None of Milotic's moves are known.}}
